title: Directory not found when updating n8n
symptom: The user receives a 'no such file or directory' error when trying to change into the 'n8n-docker-caddy' directory.
applies_when: User is trying to update n8n
not_this_if: User is in the correct directory
root_cause: The error occurs because the specified directory does not exist in the current path. This can happen if the user is in the wrong directory or if the directory was not created or named correctly.
fix_steps: Verify the current directory using 'pwd' command
Use 'ls -l' to list directories and check for 'n8n-docker-caddy'
If the directory is not found, navigate to the correct parent directory or create the directory if it doesn't exist.
agent_instruction: Ensure you are in the correct directory and that 'n8n-docker-caddy' exists before running the update commands.
